ranker_policy.p0_rule: query-backed pages that are not in a recent promotion/search release window
ranker_policy.p1_rule: QA-passed existing recommendation assets that can be refreshed by the auto-runner without production mutation
ranker_policy.hold_rule: query-suppressed, QA-blocked, or private-risk rows do not enter the auto-runner queue
ranker_policy.recently_processed_rule: next-batch-6 URLs are observed and excluded from the next auto-runner queue
ranker_policy.cms_write_policy: never_from_ranker; approval queue and CMS draft remain separate explicit gates
ranker_policy.search_release_policy: never_from_ranker; URL Truth and IndexNow remain separate explicit gates
